textPlain: Coming from PHP, the lack of trailing commas in JSON always bites me.  It's annoying when I rearrange the items and now the missing comma line was buried somewhere upwards.
Neat little blog post. But it kept me waiting for a punchline which never appeared.
I'm not sure how I'd write Python if it wasn't fixed for me by Ruff. Are there no formatters for PHP?
Trailing commas is the source of 95% of my SQL syntax errors. I know I _could_ put them at the start of the line, but it's unintuitive.
